text.data-name: "The Commercial Team Dashboard provides a centralized view of quote requests, key metrics, and trends, allowing users to manage tasks efficiently. Quick actions, detailed tables, and easy navigation enhance productivity and streamline workflows."
text.tspan: "The Commercial Team Dashboard provides a centralized view of quote requests, key metrics, and trends, allowing users to manage
tasks efficiently. Quick actions, detailed tables, and easy navigation enhance productivity and streamline workflows."

text.data-name: Quick navigation to other dashboard sections.
Pie chart for quick view of request statues (new, pending, approved, etc.).
text.tspan: Pie chart for quick view of request statues

text.data-name: Locate specific quotes or customers efficiently across the dashboard, with Customer name/Number/location etc
"Request EOT Quote" and "Request Quote" for quick task initiation.
Detailed list of active quotes with filters, sorting, and feedback icons for collaboration.
